abstract: Comprehensive best practices guide for the Codex-RS Rust codebase, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 40 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (error handling, type design) to incremental (build and CI). Each rule includes detailed explanations, real-world examples from the codex-rs codebase comparing incorrect vs. correct implementations, and specific impact metrics to guide automated code generation.
